ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query sequence */,
  "query_sequence" TEXT /* The actual sequence string for the query */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was uploaded */,
  "sequence_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequence for easier reference */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the sequence is derived */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional information about the sequence */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_sequences" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference sequence */,
  "reference_sequence" TEXT /* The actual sequence string for the reference */,
  "sequence_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference sequence */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the reference sequence is derived */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional information about the reference sequence */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the reference sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reference_sequences_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alignments" (
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alignment result */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query sequence used for the alignment */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reference sequence used for the alignment */,
  "identical_matches_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of identical matches found in the alignment */,
  "alignment_length" INTEGER /* Total length of the alignment */,
  "mismatches" INTEGER /* Number of mismatches found in the alignment */,
  "gap_openings" INTEGER /* Number of gap openings in the alignment */,
  "alignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the alignment was performed */,
  "alignment_method" TEXT /* Method used for alignment */,
  "alignment_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the alignment */,
  "alignment_score" REAL /* Overall alignment score */,
  "alignment_type" TEXT /* Type of alignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignments_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignments_reference_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_id") REFERENCES reference_sequences ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alignment_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alignment position entry */,
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alignment this position refers to */,
  "start_query" INTEGER /* Start position of the alignment in the query sequence */,
  "end_query" INTEGER /* End position of the alignment in the query sequence */,
  "start_reference" INTEGER /* Start position of the alignment in the reference sequence */,
  "end_reference" INTEGER /* End position of the alignment in the reference sequence */,
  "alignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the alignment was performed */,
  "alignment_method" TEXT /* Method used for alignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignment_positions_alignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("alignment_id") REFERENCES alignments ("alignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alignment_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alignment statistic entry */,
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alignment this statistic refers to */,
  "expect_value" REAL /* Expectation value for this alignment */,
  "bit_score" REAL /* Bit score for this alignment */,
  "alignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the alignment was performed */,
  "alignment_method" TEXT /* Method used for alignment */,
  "alignment_type" TEXT /* Type of alignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignment_statistics_alignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("alignment_id") REFERENCES alignments ("alignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
